mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_user_message ( id, to_user_id, from_user_id, from_nickname, from_avatar, msg_type, article_id, comment_id, content, is_read, email_notify, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{message.id}, #{message.toUserId}, #{message.fromUserId}, #{message.fromNickname}, #{message.fromAvatar}, #{message.msgType}, #{message.articleId}, #{message.commentId}, #{message.content}, #{message.isRead}, #{message.emailNotify}, NOW(), NOW() )
